de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule

Class JoinRuleUtils.Option<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.joinrule.JoinRuleUtils.Option<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - Type for the content of the option.
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    JoinRuleUtils.Option.None, JoinRuleUtils.Option.Some
    Enclosing class:
    JoinRuleUtils

    public abstract static class JoinRuleUtils.Option<T>
extends Object
    A simple Scala-like option type: Either Some(value) or None.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer
